name: io.github.g9781910/financial-analyst-mcp
description: Run LBO models, LP/GP waterfalls, and CRE underwriting from any AI agent. Deterministic math, institutional outputs. Pay per call.

environment_variables.name: FINANCIAL_ANALYST_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your API key from https://financial-analyst.ai/keys/create. Pre-purchase USDC credits, then pay per call ($0.25–$5.00). Get a free key to evaluate — no commitment required.
